nodes.label: Dragit App Icon
nodes.description: Application icon for Dragit. Features a stylized letter 'D' formed by a thick purple/periwinkle arc, with two purple circles at the top-left and bottom-left endpoints of the arc. In the center of the composition is a salmon/pink circle connected by a rectangular pink block, evoking a git node being dragged — referencing both the 'git' and 'drag' concepts in the app name. The overall palette is purple and pink on a white background.
